title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Atos India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Atos India Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Atos India Advisory Limited in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Atos India Advisory Limited:
Atos India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Atos India Advisory Limited!
